title: Copy into error off by one
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (value >= 0));
INSERT INTO copy_test (num_value) SELECT value FROM test_numbers WHERE value < 5;
COPY copy_test TO '/tmp/copy_test_output.csv' WITH (FORMAT CSV, DELIMITER ',');
key_bug_features: Copy into operation with off by one error
